commands.review_summary:
The branch moves prompt/media-proof tests, proof-nudge/bot-proof tests, and PR/issue label policy tests out of test/clawsweeper.test.ts into three focused test files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR reorganizes tests rather than reporting a runtime bug. The relevant validation is the targeted Node test command plus pnpm run check, and GitHub shows pnpm check succeeded for the PR head.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair lane is needed because there is no discrete code defect; this member-authored cleanup is ready for maintainer review.

target.title: test: split prompt proof label policy coverage
target.body:
## Summary

- move review prompt and media-proof policy assertions into `test/review-prompt-policy.test.ts`
- move bot proof/proof-nudge policy coverage into `test/proof-nudge-policy.test.ts`
- move PR rating, status, priority, impact, merge-risk, and issue advisory label coverage into `test/pr-label-policy.test.ts`
- remove the moved block and now-unused imports from `test/clawsweeper.test.ts`

## LOC

- `test/review-prompt-policy.test.ts`: 492 lines
- `test/proof-nudge-policy.test.ts`: 647 lines
- `test/pr-label-policy.test.ts`: 975 lines
- `test/clawsweeper.test.ts`: 14,904 lines after extraction

## Tests

- `node --test test/review-prompt-policy.test.ts test/proof-nudge-policy.test.ts test/pr-label-policy.test.ts`
- `pnpm run check`
target.author: romneyda
